headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日娱乐热点
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》《鬼上车》等片持续霸榜。《福尔摩斯小姐3》本周趋势强劲，多部续集与奇幻新作预告未来档期。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but ‘Obsession’ and ‘Ghost Ride’ dominate charts. ‘Enola Holmes 3’ surges this week; sequels and fantasy titles hint at upcoming slate.
